title: rocket_surgeon error code registry
description: Authoritative registry of all protocol error codes. No verb implementation may invent error codes not listed here.

ErrorCodeEnum.description: Canonical enumeration of all error codes in the protocol.

ErrorRegistry.description: Complete registry of error code definitions. Each entry is the authoritative specification for one error code.

examples.description: The requested verb is not valid in the current session state.
examples.suggestion_template: Session is in '{current_state}' state. Valid states for {verb}: {valid_states}. Wait or transition first.

examples.description: The specified probe point pattern does not match any component in the attached model.
examples.suggestion_template: Probe point '{target}' did not match any component. Check the component vocabulary via rocket/status or use wildcard patterns.

examples.description: The intervention recipe is malformed or specifies an unsupported intervention type.
examples.suggestion_template: Recipe '{recipe_id}' is invalid: {reason}. Check intervention type, params schema, and target format.

examples.description: The requested operation requires an attached model, but no model is currently loaded.
examples.suggestion_template: No model is attached. Call 'attach' with a valid model path first.

examples.description: The specified tensor_id does not exist in the tensor store.
examples.suggestion_template: Tensor '{tensor_id}' not found. It may have been evicted or never captured. Re-inspect or check active probes.

examples.description: The specified checkpoint_id or bookmark does not exist in this session.
examples.suggestion_template: Checkpoint '{checkpoint_id}' not found. List available checkpoints with rocket/checkpoint {{"action": "list"}}.

examples.description: The specified probe_id does not exist in this session.
examples.suggestion_template: Probe '{probe_id}' not found. List active probes with rocket/probe {{"action": "list"}}.

examples.description: The requested verb or feature requires a capability that this session does not support.
examples.suggestion_template: Capability '{capability}' is not supported. Server capabilities: {capabilities}. Check initialize response.

examples.description: The requested tensor slice indices exceed the tensor's shape.
examples.suggestion_template: Slice {slice} is out of bounds for tensor with shape {shape}. Adjust indices to fit within dimensions.

examples.description: The requested data exceeds the 64 KB response size cap.
examples.suggestion_template: Response would be {actual_size} bytes (limit: {max_size}). Use slicing, reduce top_k, or request summary only.

examples.description: The Python host process encountered an unrecoverable error.
examples.suggestion_template: Host process error: {reason}. The session is terminated. Start a new session with initialize + attach.

examples.description: A GPU ran out of memory during the requested operation.
examples.suggestion_template: GPU {device} out of memory ({free_bytes} bytes free). The session is terminated. Restart with a smaller batch size, fewer checkpoints, or fewer layers per rank.

examples.description: An NCCL collective operation timed out, indicating a multi-GPU communication failure.
examples.suggestion_template: NCCL collective '{operation}' timed out on rank {rank} after {timeout_ms}ms. Check GPU interconnect health and other ranks for errors.

examples.description: The replayed forward pass diverged from the original beyond the configured tolerance. This is informational -- replay continues.
examples.suggestion_template: Replay diverged at tick {tick_id}: {metric} = {value} (tolerance: {tolerance}). Interventions or non-determinism may be the cause.

examples.description: The model architecture is not in the server's support matrix.
examples.suggestion_template: Model family '{model_family}' is not supported. Supported families: {supported_families}.

examples.description: The model uses torch.compile and cannot be attached at Tier A (hook-based) fidelity.
examples.suggestion_template: Model is compiled with torch.compile. Tier A attach requires eager mode. Re-load the model without torch.compile, or use Tier B (limited) attach.

examples.description: An attach was requested but a model is already loaded in this session.
examples.suggestion_template: Model '{model_id}' is already attached. Call 'detach' first, then 'attach' the new model.

examples.description: The JSON-RPC request params are malformed or do not conform to the verb's schema.
examples.suggestion_template: Invalid params for '{verb}': {reason}. Check the verb schema in protocol/schema/v0.1.0/.

ErrorDefinition.description: Definition of a single error code in the registry.

code.description: Unique string identifier for this error.

numeric_code.description: JSON-RPC numeric error code. Domain errors use -32001 to -32099; JSON-RPC standard errors use their assigned codes.

suggestion_template.description: Recovery guidance template with {placeholders} for context-specific values.

applicable_verbs.description: Verbs that can raise this error.

severity.description: fatal = session terminated, recoverable = client can retry or adjust.
